GenAiFunction.description: Use this action to create or update a challenge. General Instruction: - For Type Field, displays the available values: Personal, Team - For the manager field, always send the id of the user as input for creation or update In case of creation: - Mandatory fields to ask are : Challenge Name, StartDate, EndDate Type, Description, Participants, Manager, Status - For Type Field, displays the values: Personal, Team - Participant field can be filled with a User Name or a List of Role Name - Only the status value: Draft, ToStart, OnGoing are eligible for the creation - When the status is OnGoing, the start date is Today. - The EndDate must be later than StartDate In case of Update: - Challende Id is required - Only the status value: Draft, ToStart, OnGoing, Cancelled are eligible for the creation - If the current challenge status is OnGoing, no field can be updated, excepted the status that can be updated to Cancelled - If the current challenge status is Finished or Cancelled no field can be updated - Always send the current values for the fields that are not modified.
